title: High-Entropy Hashing
description: Analyze Argon2 and Scrypt for secure password storage and key derivation. Implement high-entropy hashing algorithms suitable for modern security requirements. Understand the architectural trade-offs between CPU-hard and memory-hard hashing algorithms.
objectives: Analyze Argon2 and Scrypt for secure password storage and key derivation.
Implement high-entropy hashing algorithms suitable for modern security requirements.
Understand the architectural trade-offs between CPU-hard and memory-hard hashing algorithms.
